nasb.text: And Jesus *said to them, “You will all fall away, because it is written, ‘I will strike down the shepherd, and the sheep shall be scattered.’

esv.text: And Jesus said to them, “You will all fall away, for it is written, ‘I will strike the shepherd, and the sheep will be scattered.’

cnv.text: 耶穌對他們說：“你們都要後退，因為經上記著： ‘我要擊打牧人， 羊群就分散了。’

ccb.text: 耶稣对他们说：“你们都要背弃我，因为圣经上说， “‘我要击打牧人， 羊群将四散。’

csbs.text: 耶稣对他们说：“你们都将被绊倒，因为经上记着： ‘我将击打牧人， 羊群就被分散。’
